title: China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds
summary: China unveiled JAKA Pi, a compact humanoid with a distributed AI control system for real-time sensing and motion. Vietnam introduced Dyno and VR-H3 humanoids for homes, security, and industrial work. NVIDIA released the Isaac GR00T robot platform with Jetson Thor for researchers.
